creator: ashafer@badland.io
text:
> After manually enabling some swap space, now we can suspend and wake up just fine in graphics mode.  Maybe the nvidia driver needs to swap stuff to succesfully wake up from suspend-to-ram?

I'm confused. It works fine now, aside from the error message in #12? I don't think I've ever tested this on a machine without swap before

I would stick with UEFI + drm + vt and aim to make that work.
